ddls:
CREATE TABLE "apps" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the application */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average user rating of the application */,
  "reviews" INTEGER /* Number of user reviews for the application */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the application in bytes */,
  "installs" INTEGER /* Number of installs for the application */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the application (e.g., free, paid) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the application in the app store */,
  "content_rating_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the content rating of the application */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the application was last updated */,
  "current_version" TEXT /* Current version of the application */,
  "android_version" TEXT /* Minimum required Android version for the application */,
  "rating_new" REAL /* New user rating of the application */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who created the application */,
  "app_store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app store where the application is listed */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the app is currently active */,
  "app_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the application */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the app's icon */,
  "promotion_status" TEXT /* Indicates if the app is featured or promoted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apps_content_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_rating_id") REFERENCES content_ratings ("content_rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apps_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apps_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_ratings" (
  "content_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content rating */,
  "content_rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the content rating */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content rating */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for the content rating */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the content rating is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the application */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  "download_url" TEXT /* Download URL for the version */,
  "build_number" TEXT /* Build number of the version */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is active */,
  "compatibility" TEXT /* Compatibility with different devices */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_versions_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review has been approved */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review has been flagged for inappropriate content */,
  "helpfulness" INTEGER /* Track how helpful users find the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, developer, admin) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is verified */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device the user uses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
